Elevating Capability and Confidence

Richard Ng

  • Purpose-driven professional passionate about developing people and businesses
  • 30 years of leadership experience across public and private sectors
  • Built high-performance teams across four continents
  • More than 300 hrs of corporate training facilitation, coaching and mentoring
  • Associate Certified Coach – International Coaching Federation
  • ACLP 2.0 Certified Training Facilitator – Institute of Adult Learning
  • Certified Professional Mentor – Asia Institute of Mentoring
Book a Conversation

What People Say About Me

Yunus Mohammad

Smart City Project Manager, Parsons

I had the privilege of working closely with Richard, and I can confidently say he is one of the most principled, ethical, and purpose driven leaders I’ve encountered.

His integrity, calm yet decisive leadership style, and genuine commitment to developing people create an environment where teams consistently perform at their best. Richard leads by example, upholds high standards with empathy, and always keeps the broader vision in focus.

I wholeheartedly recommend him to any organization or individual fortunate enough to work alongside him.

Shih Jih Yao

EVP/Head Smart Utilities and Infrastructure, ST Engineering

Richard stands out in the ability to provide clarity in ambiguous situations. He is able to distil complex concepts and problems into understandable terms, enabling seamless collaboration and progress.

He prioritized right resourcing the team, staff coaching and empowering team members to reach their full potential. He excelled in fostering strong customer engagement, ensuring that customers needs were met and many a time exceeding their expectations.

HRichard's strong leadership, human-centered focus, and unwavering dedication to both customer satisfaction and team success has created positive impact to the organisation, staff individuals and customers. I am privileged to have him as part of the leadership and management team.

Tuan Ahn Pham

Founder, WNE Solutions

Having worked closely with Richard, I have been consistently impressed by his exceptional ability to lead with both vision and integrity. His leadership is not just about guiding teams towards achieving business objectives; it's about inspiring every individual to realize their full potential.

Beyond his interpersonal skills, Richard's strategic understanding of the business landscape is nothing short of remarkable. He has an innate ability to dissect complex market dynamics, identify opportunities, and craft strategies that position the organization for success. His insights have been invaluable in navigating challenges and capitalizing on opportunities, driving the business forward in a competitive environment.

Reyahd D.J. Kazmi

Owner and CEO, Kazmi Advisors

Richard is the man! He’s knowledgeable, helpful, kind, and patient recognizing that when dealing with public sector clients it takes time a true relationship development. He’s committed to his practice and always knows how to get to yes!

Miguel GAMIÑO Jr., CPA

Co-Founder and CEO, SuperCity AI

Richard has been a great business partner. He has a creative and business-oriented approach to our work. He easily navigates global markets and is willing to work together to bring new solutions to market! His leadership helped motivate our teams to create a positive impact for all stakeholders!

Cheong Keat SOH, CFA

CFO, ST Engineering North America

I had the privilege of meeting Richard early in my career. His insights and guidance were invaluable, and his coaching style is both empowering and insightful, always challenging me to think critically and reach new heights. I am grateful for the wisdom he shared with me.

Sherif Attia

Director Middle East - Telecom, Airports, ITS & Security, IDOM Consulting, Engineering, Architecture

I am pleased to recommend Richard, who consistently demonstrated exceptional business leadership throughout our time working together. His ability to communicate clearly and effectively set a strong foundation for collaboration with clients, partners, and team members alike. Richard led with a strategic mindset and a people-centered approach, fostering trust and delivering results. His professionalism, integrity, and dedication to building strong relationships made a lasting impact and positioned him as a valuable leader in any organization.

William WU

Associate, Berkeley Energy

I have been lucky to know Richard as a mentor since I was an intern and I have known him for more than 10 years now. Even to an intern, he was an attentive listener, provided constructive feedback and motivated me to improve. He is always able to provide leadership and guidance when it is needed, demonstrating high emotional quotient and human touch in a corporate environment.

What sets Richard apart is also his fiercely methodical and strategic thinking, which enables him to go beyond the surface, break down complex problems and address them at the crux. Coupled with rich experience in people management and problem solving, Richard is an effective and well respected leader in the organization.

Richard has motivated me to think bigger, embrace challenges and has been an figure of inspiration in my career. For that I am grateful for Richard's mentorship.

Ruth SEE

Project Manager, Unmanned Surface Vessels, ST Engineering

I have benefited immensely from Richard’s mentorship. He has many thoughtful principles, which he shares so freely. They always provide me with valuable perspective that has greatly helped me navigate my career. I am grateful for his guidance and support!
